SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2005 - CONTINUED TO FEB-23-2005 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 FOR OSC RE SANCTIONS TO STEVEN FINLEY FOR FAILURE TO DISMISS/FAILURE TO APPEAR. JUDGE: WALLACE P. DOUGLASS; CLERK: CRAIG BLACKSTONE; NOT REPORTED. (D. 001)

JUDGE DIANE WICK, CLERK-BETH WILBER, NOT REPORTED: STEVEN FINLEY APPEARS FOR THE APPELLANT AND EXPLAINS TO THE COURT THAT THE MATTER WAS ON CALENDAR FOR AN OSC FOR HIS FAILURE TO FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. MR. FINELY LODGES A DISMISSAL WITH THE COURT AND IT IS FILED BY THE CLERK, THE MATTER IS THEN TAKEN OFF CALENDAR.

RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT POWER, JOHN DBA POWER CONSTRUCTION AS TO RESPONDENT O'SULLIVAN, MARGARET HEARING SET FOR DEC-15-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 809167
